title: First Text Widget
description: Modify the default app to display your name in the center of the screen.
problemStatement:
Widgets are the building blocks of UI. Use the `Center` widget to place a `Text` widget in the middle of the screen. The text should say `"Hello, [Your Name]!"`.

**Requirement:** Wrap the `Text` widget inside the `body` of a `Scaffold`.
expectedOutput: A screen showing the text 'Hello, [Your Name]!' centered.
